content: Self-Refine's iterative self-feedback framework for output refinement can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to break out of local optima that single-perspective self-feedback often gets stuck in. This creates a hybrid self-improvement loop that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of needing no extra training or supervised data while fixing its common failure mode of repeating minor, incremental adjustments that never fix fundamental output flaws.
